string: SummitLink needs your location to display climbing routes, nearby mountains, and connect you with local climbers.
SummitLink uses your location in the background to track your climbing route and provide safety alerts.
SummitLink tracks your route in the background to ensure your safety during climbs.
SummitLink needs camera access to capture and share photos from your climbing adventures.
SummitLink needs access to your photo library to upload climbing photos and your profile picture.
SummitLink saves your climbing photos to your photo library.
SummitLink sends notifications for new expedition invitations, messages from fellow climbers, and safety alerts.
SummitLink uses motion data to track elevation gain and steps during your climbs.
SummitLink needs microphone access to send voice messages to your climbing team.
SummitLink connects to local devices for offline map sharing with nearby climbers.
We do not track you. This permission is required by iOS but SummitLink does not share your data with advertisers.
